audit_items.proof_trace: ber_strdup(pw) can return NULL on allocation failure even with valid pw, but result is not NULL-checked before assignment to passwd.bv_val at L1476. Line 1477 immediately dereferences passwd.bv_val via strlen() without any NULL check.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers memory pressure during authentication, causing ber_strdup allocation failure which returns NULL, leading to immediate crash in strlen(passwd.bv_val) at L1477.
